posts.text:
There are lies, damned lies and statistics.

Then there is whatever you’d call the claim that California has lower taxes than Florida.

Even people who like California governance acknowledge CA is a very high tax state: highest sales, income and gas taxes in the nation.


Tom Bevan (@TomBevanRCP)

This is just a blatant, verifiable falsehood. Here's a Wallethub 2025 analysis of the overall tax burden by state: 

California is 4th highest. 
Texas is 40th.
Florida is 45th.

nitter.net/GavinNewsom/

Happy birthday to the Father of the Constitution and the architect of the Bill of Rights, James Madison.

Madison also authored some of the most influential essays in The Federalist Papers.


Linda McMahon (@Linda_McMahon)

“Knowledge will forever govern ignorance, and a people who mean to be their own governors must arm themselves with the power which knowledge gives.” James Madison, 4th President of the United States and widely known as the “Father of the Constitution.” 🇺🇸 Born March 16, 1751

Florida has led on election integrity for years — banning ballot harvesting, eliminating Zuckerbucks, creating a state office to prosecute voter fraud, among other initiatives — and now we will be enacting the Florida SAVE Act to further bolster our nation-leading efforts.

justthenews.com/nation/state…

Great night for the USA.  

And validation that the WBC is great for baseball and a huge success.


USA Baseball (@USABaseball)

What. A. Night.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/USABaseball/status/2033408853723709547#m

Uh, do you think the DR team didn’t have MLB players?  They had many of the best players in the league.


Lord Stevie (@StevieC22534754)

They’ve got MLB players. Should be a cakewalk. Like the 1st time basketball was in the Olympics and the USA team had all NBA players.



— https://nitter.net/StevieC22534754/status/2033502867852566550#m

And yet they get away with it!


Subversive Force (@sirwg202110)

🚨 Morons from the group Take Back Power are now shoplifting en masse — but it’s “activism” in Britain 2026…

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/sirwg202110/status/2032781409056629054#m

Saying his predictions were “premature” is the NYT’s way of acknowledging he wasn’t proven right while still clinging to their ideological commitments.


Jerry Dunleavy IV 🇺🇸 (@JerryDunleavy)

Paul Elrich’s predictions were not “premature” as the New York Times claims here — rather, his predictions were just plain wrong, and they led to policies that have been destructive to human flourishing.





— https://nitter.net/JerryDunleavy/status/2033395723027218786#m

🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸


World Baseball Classic (@WBCBaseball)

Team USA is headed back to the #WorldBaseballClassic Final for the THIRD STRAIGHT TIME!





— https://nitter.net/WBCBaseball/status/2033378872956194918#m

You picked a nice spot!


Sir Golfs A Lot (@golf8aces)

He grabbed the opportunity. Hey Ron, we are currently visiting the free state of Florida and staying in Longboat Key. Great State you got here. We are visiting from SC.



— https://nitter.net/golf8aces/status/2033314650385797431#m

Rush’s only golf advice he ever gave me was to never go left.


Robert Berry, DO (@txsportsdoc)

One more reason not to go Left😂



— https://nitter.net/txsportsdoc/status/2033336757752648031#m

To hit that bomb on that hole under those circumstances — wow.  One of the best drives I’ve ever seen.


PGA TOUR (@PGATOUR)

CRUSHED! 375 yards down the fairway. 

Cameron Young sets the tone down No. 18 with the longest drive of the day by nearly 20 yards.

📺 NBC | @THEPLAYERS

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/PGATOUR/status/2033300994566557793#m

That DR lineup is stacked which makes that even more impressive.


DraftKings (@DraftKings)

The Dominican Republic’s starting lineup has just 3 hits in 27 career at-bats (.111) against Paul Skenes 😳

Stat line prediction for tomorrow? 👇





— https://nitter.net/DraftKings/status/2032951313093505266#m

Go USA — beat the DR tonight in Miami!

Executive order incoming to lift pitch limit for Skenes.  Gotta go all out for America.

Marlins stadium will nuts!


USA Baseball (@USABaseball)



  




— https://nitter.net/USABaseball/status/2033221907038777550#m

USA!  USA!


Talkin' Baseball (@TalkinBaseball_)

USA lineup vs. Canada tonight:

1. Bobby Witt Jr., SS
2. Bryce Harper, 1B
3. Aaron Judge, RF
4. Kyle Schwarber, DH
5. Alex Bregman, 3B
6. Roman Anthony, LF
7. Cal Raleigh, C
8. Brice Turang, 2B
9. Pete Crow-Armstrong, CF
SP Logan Webb





— https://nitter.net/TalkinBaseball_/status/2032534062414409954#m

Outstanding!


Anastasios Kamoutsas (@StasiKamoutsas)

Today, Florida legislators passed House Bill 1279, a bill that allows school districts to forgo collective bargaining and give immediate pay increases to top-performing teachers assigned to persistently low-performing schools.

Thank you to @LeeSchools, Superintendent @Dhatherop, and the Lee County School Board for paving the way for this student-first policy that will be implemented by school districts across the state!









— https://n

Florida SAVE Act on the way!


The Floridian (@Floridianpress)

Florida Republicans just got their state SAVE Act through the Legislature.

The bill would require proof of U.S. citizenship and photo ID for voter registration. 

@FloridaGOP 
 @EvanPowers 

floridianpress.com/2026/03/f…




— https://nitter.net/Floridianpress/status/2032481559434117531#m

Alito is a great Justice and deserves to have his achievements profiled.


Mollie (@MZHemingway)

"Hemingway tells the riveting, behind-the-scenes history of Justice Alito’s time on the Court.... If you want to know where the future of American jurisprudence is headed, you need to pay attention to Alito.”— @BasedMikeLee 

Preorder now here! tinyurl.com/wfb2n78a





— https://nitter.net/MZHemingway/status/2032314859908391016#m
